summary: France vs Argentina — 1x2 home: sharp fair 55.6% vs the polymarket 52.0% → +3.6pp (ROI +6.9%), GOOD. De-vigged from pinnacle (power). Detection only — the edge is information, not a pick.
caveats: 1x2 fair = regulation 90-min (home/draw/away priced separately). If the external contract includes extra time or 'to advance / win the tie', that's a different market — compare against a to-qualify line instead.
